perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing glasses and a gray flat cap is centered in the frame, speaking directly to the camera against a soft-lit background. (2) The scene cuts briefly to a retail display featuring various smartphones from brands like vivo and OPPO. (3) The man returns to the screen, continuing his explanation while several graphic overlays, including email envelopes, company logos (Barracuda), and icons representing AI and data, appear and transition around him. He uses expressive hand gestures and facial expressions to emphasize his points.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music. A male voice starts speaking in a clear, energetic, and professional tone in Mandarin Chinese. (2) As the man discusses AI-generated spam, the music maintains a consistent tempo. Frequent 'whoosh' and 'ding' sound effects are used to punctuate the appearance of on-screen graphics and text overlays. (3) The vocal delivery remains dense and continuous throughout the video, ending with a firm closing statement as the music fades.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '垃圾郵件也要升級' (Spam emails also need to upgrade) - Hook text. (2) Decorative Text: 'AI正大規模入侵你的信箱' (AI is invading your mailbox on a large scale) - Highlighting the main topic with a serious tone. (3) Promotional Text: '推薦大家買手機到米可' (Recommend everyone to buy mobile phones at Miko) - Direct endorsement. (4) Functional Text: Subtitles tracking the spoken narration in Traditional Chinese.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Contextual Information -> Promotional Break -> Detailed Analysis -> Conclusion/Warning

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man with glasses, a gray flat cap, wearing a purple t-shirt and a beaded bracelet on his left wrist.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Primary scene is a clean studio environment; secondary scene shows a smartphone retail counter with display models.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as an informative piece of tech news warning users about the increasing threat of AI-generated spam and phishing emails, which are becoming more difficult to identify due to natural language processing. Intermixed with this warning is an explicit promotional segment for '米可' (Miko), a smartphone retailer, suggesting the video is a piece of sponsored content or influencer marketing.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct verbal recommendation and a dedicated visual cut to the retailer's store display.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: The creator uses a consistent visual persona (cap, glasses) and an upbeat, fast-talking delivery style characteristic of 3C technology influencers.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The integration of a product endorsement within a topical news alert is a common strategy to maintain viewer trust while fulfilling marketing obligations.
